calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Nov-19-2008 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Blanche Jaurigui (Petitioner) appears in propria persona. Bruce Alexis (Respondent) appears in propria persona with Diana Rubio (Girlfriend/Witness) and Vivian Alexis (Mother/Witness).

All parties and witnesses were sworn in open court.

Stipulation that Commissioner may act as Judge Pro Tempore signed by Petitioner and filed in court.

The matter came on calendar for the regularly scheduled hearing for orders to stop elder or dependent adult abuse. All parties and witnesses testified. Upon conclusion of testimony, the Court finds both parties equally credible. Therefore, the Petitioner's request for a restraining order is denied without prejudice.

Department 318. Judge Pro Temp: Sue Kaplan. Court Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#. Clerk: J. Alameda/ S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: Deputy J. Guitron.
